CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-18-2024 Continued To Sep-25-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Zr Jackson, L.P.?S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment By Default
Off Calendar Aug-09-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:41 am and concluding at 10:26 am.

Plaintiff Z.R. Jackson, L.P. is represented by Dana Andreoli, Esq. via zoom video conference.
Defendant Project 1920 Inc. DBA Senreve not appering.

WILL BAKKER is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and testifies.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

Plaintiff confirms that the Judgment will resolve the entire action.

The Court Finds:
1. The Complaint filed on November 16, 2024 is the operative pleading.
2. Default was entered as to Defendant on May 9, 2024.
3. Doe Defendants were dismissed on February 27, 2024.
4. Defendant has breached the lease term.

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Z.R. Jackson, L.P., and against Defendant Project 1920 Inc. DBA Senreve, as follows:

1. Damages: $183,977.24
2. Prejudgment Interest: $16,583.15
3. Costs: $475.25
4. Attorney fees: $15,576.50

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $216,612.14

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)
